Funded Trading Plus 10% OFF Deal

Funded Trading Plus is offering a 10% discount on all challenge accounts using code FTPLUS. This promotion gives traders an accessible entry into one of the UK's most respected proprietary trading environments, most notably known for its pioneering Static Drawdown model — a system where your maximum loss limit is fixed at the account's starting balance and never tightens, no matter how much profit you accumulate.

Funded Trading Plus is a UK-based proprietary trading firm with an institutional foundation and a long-standing reputation for reliability and innovation. The firm pioneered the static drawdown concept in the prop trading space, which has since been adopted by other firms who recognized its psychological and operational advantages for traders. Their UK base provides regulatory credibility and operational stability that adds an extra layer of confidence for funded traders.

With code FTPLUS, you receive 10% off any Funded Trading Plus challenge tier, including their Prestige, Experienced, and Master programs up to $100,000. The primary benefit — the static drawdown — means that once you book profits, your drawdown limit does not rise against you. A trader at $10,000 profit on a $100K account still has the same maximum drawdown ceiling as on Day 1, eliminating the trailing-drawdown trap that causes many evaluations to fail right after strong performance.

Funded Trading Plus operates on the DXTrade platform, providing direct and reliable trading access. The firm supports forex and CFD instruments across major and minor pairs, with clear rules around lot sizing, holding periods, and risk per trade. Payouts are processed reliably, and the firm has an established track record of funding and paying traders consistently.

To claim this discount, visit Funded Trading Plus via the affiliate link above, select your preferred program tier, and enter FTPLUS at checkout. The 10% saving will be applied to your order total. Review the static drawdown terms on the Funded Trading Plus site to fully understand how this model protects your funded account as you grow your profits.
